**Analyzing strike announcement**

I need to determine if this document is announcing a new or upcoming strike based on the content in Italian. It discusses a 24-hour strike on December 13, 2024, but then mentions "sciopero revocato," indicating that the strike has been revoked. So, according to the instructions, since the document includes this revocation, I should set the "isStrike" value to false. Overall, it seems this document does not announce an active strike.
